intro: Atropa belladonna elixir, also known as deadly nightshade elixir, is a highly toxic and potentially lethal concoction made from the poisonous Atropa belladonna plant. Historically, some alchemists and herbalists attempted to create an elixir from this plant, often with disastrous consequences, as the plant contains tropane alkaloids that can cause hallucinations, delirium, and even death. Due to its extreme toxicity, creating or consuming an Atropa belladonna elixir is strictly forbidden in modern times and is not recommended for any purpose.
